why_listen.en: A hypnotic Cuban melody that transports you to the streets of Havana. The gentle interplay of guitar and vocals is pure warmth and nostalgia.
The song that brought Mexican folk music to the world. Its infectious energy and driving rhythm make it impossible not to dance and smile.
Selena's voice is pure joy made audible. This cumbia classic radiates warmth and will have you swaying from the first note.
The father of Afrobeat at his most powerful. This 12-minute groove is a masterclass in rhythm, protest, and the unifying power of music.
Mama Africa's most beloved song is pure sunshine in musical form. The playful Xhosa lyrics and irresistible rhythm make everyone a dancer.
The first African single to sell over a million copies in Europe. Its kora-driven melody and euphoric energy bridge continents and generations.
Nusrat's voice is a force of nature that transcends language. This collaboration with Michael Brook merges Qawwali devotion with modern production into something otherworldly and uplifting.
The only Japanese-language song to reach number one in the US. Its bittersweet melody is universally beautiful and proves music needs no translation.
Pure unfiltered joy and one of the first viral music videos globally. Its Bhangra beat and Daler Mehndi's infectious energy are guaranteed to lift any mood.
Perhaps the most romantic song ever written. Piaf's voice turns the simple idea of seeing the world through rose-colored glasses into something transcendent and eternal.
The song that made the world fall in love with Italian music. Its soaring chorus about flying through a painted blue sky is the definition of joyful abandon.
Louis Armstrong's gravelly voice singing about the beauty of everyday life is the ultimate antidote to cynicism. A song that makes you want to slow down and appreciate being alive.
Every little thing is gonna be alright. Bob Marley distilled the entire philosophy of optimism into one perfect, breezy reggae tune that has comforted millions.
Warda's voice is velvet and fire at once. This classic Arabic love song builds with orchestral grandeur into an overwhelming wave of emotion and beauty.
Fairuz's crystalline voice is the sound of Lebanon and the entire Arab world waking up in the morning. This song is gentle, hopeful, and profoundly beautiful.
An irresistibly upbeat anthem that became the soundtrack to smiles worldwide. Its sunny groove and hand-clapping energy make it impossible not to dance along.
BTS delivered a burst of pure joy with this retro-disco bop that broke YouTube records overnight. It radiates positivity and the thrill of letting loose on the dance floor.
The 2010 FIFA World Cup anthem blends Shakira's Latin fire with South African rhythms into a universal celebration of togetherness.
A shimmering blend of classical strings and electronic beats that feels like a warm embrace. Its message of contentment and love has made it one of the decade's most beloved pop songs.
Sia proves you don't need money to have a great night out. This reggae-tinged dance anthem is pure, carefree fun that gets everyone moving.
This feel-good anthem captures the pure joy of music making your body move. Its infectious groove earned an Oscar nomination and billions of smiles.
A retro funk explosion that dominated the 2010s with swagger and style. Bruno Mars channels the spirit of James Brown and Prince into a modern anthem that never fails to ignite a party.
BLACKPINK's empowering comeback anthem is all about rising after a fall with fierce confidence. Its explosive beat drops and bold energy make it the ultimate pick-me-up.
Carlos Santana turned Tito Puente's mambo classic into a sizzling Latin rock masterpiece. Its hypnotic guitar riffs and irresistible rhythm have kept people grooving for over 50 years.
New Zealand's most beloved pop song is sung entirely in te reo Maori and fuses traditional chanting with 80s synth-pop. Pure Kiwi joy and a triumphant celebration of indigenous culture.
This South African house anthem sparked a global dance challenge that united millions during the pandemic. Its uplifting Zulu vocals and driving beat are a testament to music's healing power.
The Gipsy Kings brought fiery Romani flamenco to the global stage with this unstoppable party anthem. Its passionate guitar strumming and handclaps radiate pure Mediterranean sunshine.
A breathtakingly beautiful duet about innocence and hope that transcends language and borders. Youssou N'Dour's soaring Wolof vocals alongside Neneh Cherry create a timeless message of unity.
Named the best Arabic pop song of the 21st century, this Egyptian classic wraps tender romance in a warm Mediterranean melody. Its gentle guitar and heartfelt vocals feel like a love letter to life.
This Brazilian-French fusion became the soundtrack of summer 1989, topping charts in over 15 countries. Its swirling melody and irresistible tropical rhythm will have you swaying in seconds.
